title: Egyptian Flatbread
description: A classic Egyptian flatbread recipe, crispy and delicious.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the Egyptian wheat flour and salt.
2. Gradually add the water and mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
4. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions.
5. Roll out each portion into a thin circle.
6. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
7. Cook the flatbread for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
8. Brush the flatbread with crispy flatbread crumbs.
10. Repeat with the remaining dough portions.
